title: Athletic Circuit
description: 3-round circuit with lunges, Hindu push-ups, bear hold and high knees for a complete challenge

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Paused lunges
exercises.instructions: Lower and hold 3s at the bottom before coming back up

exercises.name: Hindu push-ups
exercises.instructions: Diving motion: dive down then arc back up

exercises.name: Bear hold
exercises.instructions: On all fours, knees 2cm off the floor, hold

exercises.name: Sumo squats
exercises.instructions: Feet very wide, toes pointed out

exercises.name: High knees
exercises.instructions: Run in place, knees above hips, arms coordinated

exercises.name: Russian twists
exercises.instructions: Seated, feet off the floor, twist torso left to right

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
